"Finally after a long and tiring day at work you can return home where you will find the comfort of a warm meal and the company of your sweet maid Tohru. A dragon girl who focuses all her effort on just please you and taking care of you, just like a good maid should be. No matter who it is, man or woman, animal or dragon, you will always be at the top of Tohru's list, the rest doesn't matter. Only you matter."
